MdTestData.MdString: - Extra spaces for alignment 1. This is a sublist - Another item

• Extra spaces for alignment
    1. This is a sublist
  • Another item
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString: - Extra spaces for alignment 1. This is a sublist - Another item

MdTestData.MdString:
# Should be a Paragrah - [ ] a task something
# Should be List SubContent - [ ] a task something
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlString:
Should be a Paragrah

  • a task

something

Should be List SubContent

  • a task

    something
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
# Should be a Paragrah - [ ] a task something
# Should be List SubContent - [ ] a task something

MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlString: -

MdTestData.MdString:
- Top-level item - Subitem level 1 - Subitem level 2 - Subitem level 3
- This list has - Uneven indentation - But still renders - Correctly!
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlString:
• Top-level item
    • Subitem level 1
      • Subitem level 2
        • Subitem level 3
  • This list has
    • Uneven indentation
      • But still renders
        • Correctly!
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
- Top-level item - Subitem level 1 - Subitem level 2 - Subitem level 3
- This list has - Uneven indentation - But still renders - Correctly!

MdTestData.MdString:
- Item 1 1. Subitem 1.1 2. Subitem 1.2 - Item 2
- Unordered item 1 - Unordered item 2 1. Mixed nested ordered item 2.1 2. Mixed nested ordered item 2.2 - Unordered item 3
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlString:
• Item 1
    1. Subitem 1.1
    2. Subitem 1.2
  • Item 2
  • Unordered item 1
  • Unordered item 2
    1. Mixed nested ordered item 2.1
    2. Mixed nested ordered item 2.2
  • Unordered item 3
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
- Item 1 1. Subitem 1.1 2. Subitem 1.2 - Item 2
- Unordered item 1 - Unordered item 2 1. Mixed nested ordered item 2.1 2. Mixed nested ordered item 2.2 - Unordered item 3

MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlString:
• Item 1
    • Subitem 1.1
    • Subitem 1.2
  • Item 2

MdTestData.MdString: - [~] something this does not work - [ ] empty - [x] checked - [X] checked

• something this does not work
  • empty
  • checked
  • checked
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString: - [~] something this does not work - [ ] empty - [x] checked - [X] checked

- Normal item - [ ] Task item without sublist related paragraph between list items.
- [x] Another completed task

• Normal item
  • Task item without sublist

    related paragraph between list items.

  • Another completed task

- Normal item - [ ] Task item without sublist related paragraph between list items.
- [x] Another completed task

MdTestData.MdString:
- [ ] Task with sublist - SubItem A - SubItem B - [x] Completed task with sublist - SubItem C - SubItem D
- [x] Mixed list 1. [ ] Subtask 1 2. [x] Subtask 2 - Another item
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlString:
• Task with sublist
    • SubItem A
    • SubItem B
  • Completed task with sublist
    • SubItem C
    • SubItem D
  • Mixed list
    1. Subtask 1
    2. Subtask 2
  • Another item
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
- [ ] Task with sublist - SubItem A - SubItem B - [x] Completed task with sublist - SubItem C - SubItem D
- [x] Mixed list 1. [ ] Subtask 1 2. [x] Subtask 2 - Another item

- Normal item - [ ] Task item without sublist
Unrelated paragraph between list items.
- [x] Another completed task

  • Task item without sublist

Unrelated paragraph between list items.

  • Another completed task

Unrelated paragraph between list items.
- [x] Another completed task

MdTestData.MdString: - A list item with **bold text** - A list item with *italic text* - A list item with `inline code`
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlString:
• A list item with bold text
  • A list item with italic text
  • A list item with inline code
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString: - A list item with **bold text** - A list item with *italic text* - A list item with `inline code`
